rationale.chunk_size: Smaller chunks (256) improve precision for technical docs with dense information
rationale.chunk_overlap: 25% overlap preserves context at chunk boundaries
rationale.top_k: Higher k (8) with reranking gives better recall without sacrificing precision
rationale.reranking: Cross-encoder reranking significantly improves relevance ordering
rationale.hybrid_search: Combining dense and sparse retrieval handles both semantic and keyword queries
